house_rules_list:
Dear guest, welcome!

For a pleasant stay, please observe the following rules:

  • No pets allowed in the house.
  • No parties/events allowed.
  • Quiet hours from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM and from 11:00 PM to 7:00 AM.
  • Be respectful of the environment and leave it as you would like to find it.
  • Smoking: Traditional and electronic cigarettes are not allowed in the house.
  • For security and comfort reasons, please inform us about additional guests. The maximum capacity of the accommodation must be respected.
  • For environmental protection, please sort waste using the containers in the kitchen.
  • Contribute to sustainability by turning off lights and all electronic devices when not at home. Also, remember to turn off air conditioning before leaving.
  • Check-out by 10:00 AM.
contact_text: Dear guests, I am here to help you with any needs. If you encounter a problem or have questions, do not hesitate to contact me by phone/WhatsApp or email. I am always available to help make your stay as pleasant and stress-free as possible.
welcome_text:
Welcome home!

We are truly excited to welcome you to our holiday home. This welcome app has been carefully developed to make you feel pampered and ensure an unforgettable stay. On our part, we are committed to making your stay as comfortable and welcoming as possible. In these pages you will find essential information about our holiday home and some useful tips to explore the beauty of our territory.
This app will provide you with valuable information about the services at your disposal, so you can immediately feel at ease and at home. Furthermore, we can't help but share with you some of the hidden and unmissable treasures of our territory. From historical places to delicious local delicacies, this app will be your ideal companion to fully enjoy every moment of your stay. We are here to make your experience truly unforgettable and full of moments that will remain etched in your memory.

Welcome to Terracina, your dream destination awaits you!
checkin:
Check-in

3:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Please kindly respect check-in times. If you wish to arrive earlier, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you, depending on our schedule.
checkout:
Check-out

8:00 AM - 10:00 AM

If you wish to check out later, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you, depending on our schedule.
checkout_list:
Before leaving:
  • Make sure to leave the house in good condition, as you found it.
  • The apartment keys must be returned to the host in person at check-out, unless otherwise agreed.
  • Remove all your personal belongings.
  • Turn off all lights and appliances (air conditioners, oven, microwave).
  • Close all windows and doors.
